policy_note: All v4 payloads are prompt injection samples: textual inputs that attempt to hijack LLM behaviour at runtime. They are labeled attack samples (expected_detection=True) for training binary injection detectors. No sample instructs generation of harmful content independently of the injection framing. The injection target (exfiltration URL, system prompt disclosure, privilege escalation) is the detection signal, not a usable exploit.
